# Generated by tools/m7_war.py --write; M7 removes vanilla unit and levy unlocks.
# Non-unit advance content is retained verbatim until M8 replaces the full tree.
######################
# Heavy Ship
######################
unlock_early_carrack_advance = {
	age = age_2_renaissance

	requires = dock_advance

	ai_preference_tags = {
		exploration
	}

}

unlock_carrack_advance = {
	age = age_3_discovery


	in_tree_of = new_world_advance

	ai_preference_tags = {
		exploration
	}

}

unlock_galleon_advance = {
	age = age_4_reformation


	in_tree_of = global_trade_advance

	ai_preference_tags = {
		exploration
	}

}

unlock_twodecker_advance = {
	age = age_5_absolutism


	in_tree_of = scientific_revolution_advance

	ai_preference_tags = {
		exploration
	}

}

unlock_threedecker_advance = {
	age = age_6_revolutions


	in_tree_of = enlightenment_advance

	ai_preference_tags = {
		exploration
	}

}

unlock_ship_of_the_line_advance = {
	age = age_6_revolutions


	requires = unlock_threedecker_advance

	ai_preference_tags = {
		exploration
	}

}

unlock_war_galleon = {
	age = age_4_reformation

	potential = {
		original_capital ?= { continent = continent:europe }
	}


	requires = unlock_galleon_advance

	ai_preference_tags = {
		exploration
	}

}

unlock_baochuan = {
	age = age_3_discovery

	potential = {
		culture = {
			has_culture_group = culture_group:chinese_group
		}
	}


	in_tree_of = new_world_advance

	ai_preference_tags = {
		exploration
	}

}


######################
# Light Ship
######################

unlock_barque_advance = {
	age = age_2_renaissance

	requires = dock_advance

}

unlock_caravel_advance = {
	age = age_3_discovery


	requires = open_sea_exploration

}

unlock_pinnace_advance = {
	age = age_4_reformation


	in_tree_of = global_trade_advance

}

unlock_frigate_advance = {
	age = age_5_absolutism


	in_tree_of = scientific_revolution_advance

}

unlock_heavy_frigate_advance = {
	age = age_6_revolutions


	in_tree_of = enlightenment_advance

}

unlock_bomb_ketch = {
	age = age_6_revolutions


	requires = unlock_heavy_frigate_advance


}

unlock_dhow = {
	age = age_1_traditions

	potential = {
		original_capital ?= {
			OR = {
				region = region:arabia_region
				region = region:persia_region
				region = region:somalia_region
				region = region:egypt_region
				region = region:nubia_region
				region = region:ethiopia_region
				region = region:swahili_coast_region
				region = region:deccan_region
				region = region:western_india_region
			}
		}
	}


}




######################
# Galley
######################
unlock_traditional_galley_advance = {
	age = age_1_traditions

	starting_technology_level = 2
	requires = ship_building_advance

	allow = { 
		has_embraced_institution = institution:feudalism
	}


}

unlock_m_galley_advance = {
	age = age_2_renaissance

	requires = naval_morale_advance_1

}

unlock_war_galley_advance = {
	age = age_3_discovery

	requires = port_cost_distance_from_capital_advance

}

unlock_galleass_advance = {
	age = age_4_reformation
	potential = {
		NOT = { culture = { has_culture_group = culture_group:italian_group } }
	}

	in_tree_of = global_trade_advance

}

unlock_xebec_advance = {
	age = age_5_absolutism


	in_tree_of = scientific_revolution_advance

}


italian_galleass = {
	age = age_4_reformation
	potential = {
		culture = { has_culture_group = culture_group:italian_group }
	}

	in_tree_of = global_trade_advance

}

unlock_archipelago_frigate = {
	age = age_6_revolutions

	potential = {
		original_capital ?= {
			OR = {
				region = region:scandinavian_region
				region = region:north_german_region
				region = region:baltic_region
				region = region:russian_region
			}
		}
	}


	in_tree_of = enlightenment_advance

}


unlock_cakradonya = {
	age = age_4_reformation

	potential = {
		OR = {
			culture = culture:acehnese_culture
			culture = { merged_culture_group_contains_culture = culture:acehnese_culture }
		}
	}


	in_tree_of = global_trade_advance

}

unlock_galiot = {
	age = age_4_reformation

	potential = {
		original_capital ?= {
			OR = {
				region = region:iberia_region
				region = region:france_region
				region = region:italy_region
				region = region:maghreb_region
				region = region:balkan_region
				region = region:anatolia_region
				region = region:egypt_region
				region = region:crescent_region
			}
		}
	}


	in_tree_of = global_trade_advance

}

unlock_sekibune = {
	age = age_3_discovery

	potential = {
		culture = {
			has_culture_group = culture_group:japanese_group
		}
	}


	in_tree_of = new_world_advance

}

unlock_atakebune = {
	age = age_3_discovery

	potential = {
		culture = {
			has_culture_group = culture_group:japanese_group
		}
	}


	in_tree_of = new_world_advance

}

unlock_long_fada = {
	age = age_1_traditions

	potential = {
		culture = {
			OR = {
				has_culture_group = culture_group:scottish_group
				has_culture_group = culture_group:hibernian_group
			}
		}
	}
	requires = ship_building_advance
	allow_children = no


}

unlock_long_fada_2 = {
	age = age_2_renaissance

	potential = {
		culture = {
			OR = {
				has_culture_group = culture_group:scottish_group
				has_culture_group = culture_group:hibernian_group
			}
		}
	}
	requires = naval_morale_advance_1
	allow_children = no

}

# Transports
######################
unlock_cog_advance = {
	age = age_1_traditions 

	requires = unlock_traditional_galley_advance
	starting_technology_level = 3


}
unlock_hulk_advance = {
	age = age_2_renaissance

	requires = trade_range_advance_age_2


}
unlock_flute_advance = {
	age = age_3_discovery


	in_tree_of = new_world_advance

}

unlock_brig_advance = {
	age = age_4_reformation


	in_tree_of = global_trade_advance

}

unlock_merchantman_advance = {
	age = age_5_absolutism


	in_tree_of = scientific_revolution_advance

}

unlock_eastindiaman_advance = {
	age = age_6_revolutions


	in_tree_of = enlightenment_advance
